note: Extracted via direct DOM query (outerHTML/computed style) since generic heuristics above missed the exact row/badge markup. Container: div.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl.border.border-slate-200.bg-white > div.divide-y.divide-slate-50 > button rows.

statFilterCard.className_unselected_normal: rounded-lg border px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left transition border-slate-200 bg-white hover:border-slate-300 min-w-[92px]
statFilterCard.className_unselected_zeroCount: rounded-lg border px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left transition border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/60 min-w-[92px]
statFilterCard.className_selected: rounded-lg border px-2.5 py-1.5 text-left transition border-slate-800 bg-white shadow-sm min-w-[92px]
statFilterCard.behavior: Toggle filter: click selects (border-slate-800 + shadow-sm) and filters list to that status; click again deselects and list returns to unfiltered (all statuses, ordered as originally fetched). Label span classes below; count is a separate bold text-lg-ish line under the label (font-semibold text-slate-900 by default, text-slate-300 for zero-count EN CURSO).

statusBadgeLabelSpan_insideCard.NUEVAS: block truncate rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide bg-rose-100 text-rose-700
statusBadgeLabelSpan_insideCard.AUTO: block truncate rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide bg-sky-100 text-sky-700
statusBadgeLabelSpan_insideCard.EN CURSO (zero count): block truncate rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide bg-transparent text-slate-300
statusBadgeLabelSpan_insideCard.RESUELTAS: block truncate rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700
statusBadgeLabelSpan_insideCard.DESCARTADAS: block truncate rounded px-1 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide bg-slate-100 text-slate-500

listRow.rowButton_className: flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-left transition-colors hover:bg-slate-50
listRow.statusBadge_span_className: w-24 shrink-0 truncate rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-center text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide + bg/text color per status (same palette as statFilterCard but w-24 text-center variant, e.g. Descartadas: bg-slate-100 text-slate-500; Resueltas: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700)
listRow.typeTagChip_span_className (optional, on: shrink-0 rounded bg-violet-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-violet-700 — text observed: 'Idea' (only tag value seen in seed data; presumably a report-type enum e.g. Idea/Bug/Duda)
listRow.mainText_span_className: min-w-0 flex-1 truncate text-sm text-slate-800 (single line, ellipsis; original multi-line text collapses to first visual line)
listRow.attachmentIcon_span_className (optional): shrink-0 text-[11px] text-slate-400, content: paperclip emoji 📎 — shown only when the incidencia was reported with a screenshot attached
listRow.routePath_span_className: hidden w-40 shrink-0 truncate text-[11px] text-slate-400 lg:block — shows the app route where it was reported, e.g. '/', '/euphoric/calendario', '/shows/nuevo', '/shows/08ea3304-af17-4722-84d5-d3b63347fe74', '/euphoric/campanas', '/shows/95a152d1-d546-400b-904d-195f84400c66'
listRow.trailingDash_span_className: w-20 shrink-0 text-right text-[11px] text-slate-400, content: '—' (em dash) — placeholder column, empty in all seed rows (likely reserved for a future response/assignee summary)
listRow.avatar_span_className: outer: w-[18px] shrink-0; inner: grid shrink-0 place-items-center rounded-full font-semibold text-white, inline style width:18px height:18px font-size:8px background-color:<per-user color>, aria-label=<full name>, text=<2-letter initials>

avatar_colors_observed.JC: blue (exact rgb not captured, seen as blue circle in screenshot)
avatar_colors_observed.unlabeled/no-name rows: gray silhouette avatar placeholder (default person icon, no initials) — used when reporter identity unknown/anonymous

emptyState.className_approx: centered gray text (text-slate-400), shown in place of the list container's rows when filtered status has 0 items (observed for EN CURSO)

pageHeader.subtitle: Lo que el equipo reporta desde el panel de ayuda. Responder es lo que hace que sigan reportando. (text-slate-500, ~14px)
